heading: Vessel maintenance
label: 57520 Vessel maintenance

children.text: keep the chartered vessel in good repair and efficient operating condition; and
make any repairs required by the Secretary of Transportation.

children.heading: .—Inspection
children.label: b .—Inspection
children.text: The charter shall provide that the Secretary has the right to inspect the vessel at any time to ascertain its condition.
